channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Paint spill on Pavement, 10th July
item.description:
This paint spill occurred as omeone left a leaking tin in waste pile, I must stress this is not related to the Farrow & ball paint showroom it is outside of. It is unrelated to Farrow & Ball - however we are reporting it as its outside our showroom.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 255, Fulham Road, Brompton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pram left, 10th July
item.description:
Left in alleyway off Southwold Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all over Shoreditch Park, 10th July
item.description:
Shoreditch park is covered in rubbish. Some of it appears to be ripped up school supplies from the local primary school.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Poole Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish everywhere opposite 42 Wisley Road, 10th July
item.description:
You said this has been fixed, the road is full of litter and has not been cleaned? All.opposite 42 etc The road is full of litter
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2A, Wisley Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bath dumped on grass verge, 10th July
item.description:
Bath dumped on grass verge just past Wanstead Close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wanstead Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th July
item.description:
Two sofas dumped on the pavement outside 111 Ancona Road and A bed and mattress dumped on the pavement outside 104 Ancona Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ancona Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped package, 10th July
item.description:
Address on box - please fine! Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68a, Goodrich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter widely strewn, 10th July
item.description:
Stretch of pavement along Oakfield Road opposite The Range. Dustbin men have been & left a multitude of litter on the pavement. It is disgraceful that it has been left like this. Constant rubbish & flytipping are a constant problem along this road, a permanent solution needs to be exercised.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 126, Oakfield Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog walker paths overgrown, 10th July
item.description:
The dog walker paths are overgrown with brambles, stinging nettles and weeds. Especially the paths towards Crayford and running alongside Mayplace School fence. Please could someone use a petrol strimmer to clear them. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Martens Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Emergency access gates left open, 10th July
item.description:
Emergency access gates have been left open. URGENT: this is a school road and children are frequently crossing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Surrey Square, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalised bench - set on fire, 10th July
item.description:
A bench on the path outside of the playground facing the meadow has been set on fire and is badly damaged on one side of the seat.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leesons Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping in Hoblingwell, 10th July
item.description:
Bedframe has been flytipped in the usual spot behind the enclosed yard by the carpark.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leesons Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cannot fill water bag, 10th July
item.description:
Please can this be filled
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Dynham Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Watering - Young tree not being watered

item.title: Bollards missing - drivers mounting pavement, 10th July
item.description:
Bollards missing at the junction of Holmdale Terrace and Amhurst Park Rd. Drivers are regularly mounting the pavements here at the corner putting pedestrians in danger. Also, it's often clogged with cars and vans here. Isn't this meant to be a Cycleway?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Park, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black Bag Dumped, 10th July
item.description:
There is a black bag dumped near the alley way on the right hand side of Ethelbert Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ethelbert Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Man hole cover out of place., 10th July
item.description:
After the power cut on Wednesday, engineers have been inspecting wiring etc. The cover has not been located back in position correctly. An easy trip situation....

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marlow Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This pco parks here and runs the engine for hours, 10th July
item.description:
This pco car parks here on double yellow line with the engine running all the time. Very rude and aggressive person

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black sacks, 10th July
item.description:
Pile of black sacks dumped on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Treveris Street, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of timber on pavement, 10th July
item.description:
Pile of timber on pavement
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bethune Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish all along road in area indicated., 10th July
item.description:
Looks like serious fly tipping and emptying cars. This is a persistent problem.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tizzard Grove, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet
